# cap-radio-group



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                     | Type      | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `disabled` | `disabled` | Disables all child radios                       | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `error`    | `error`    | Error message                                   | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `hint`     | `hint`     | Hint text                                       | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `label`    | `label`    | Group label                                     | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `name`     | `name`     | Name shared across all child cap-radio elements | `string`  | `undefined` |
| `required` | `required` | Marks all child radios as required              | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `value`    | `value`    | Currently selected value                        | `string`  | `undefined` |


## Events

| Event       | Description                             | Type                  |
| ----------- | --------------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| `capChange` | Emitted when the selected value changes | `CustomEvent<string>` |
